name: evm-cosmos-indicator-htlc
description: Atomic cross-chain transfer of environmental indicator tokens via HTLC with automatic callback (Polygon <-> Neutron via Axelar GMP)

scripts.compile:cosmwasm: cd cosmwasm-contract && docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)":/code --mount type=volume,source="$(basename "$(pwd)")_cache",target=/target --mount type=volume,source=registry_cache,target=/usr/local/cargo/registry cosmwasm/optimizer:0.15.0
